component.name: TennoHelios
component.summary: Warframe relic reward overlay for Linux

description.p: TennoHelios is a Linux-native companion overlay for Warframe. When the relic reward screen appears, TennoHelios automatically detects it, reads the item names via OCR, fetches live platinum and ducat values from warframe.market, and displays a transparent overlay showing all four rewards with price highlights — so you can make the best choice without alt-tabbing.

ul.li: Automatic reward screen detection via EE.log
Live platinum and ducat prices from warframe.market
Best platinum pick highlighted in green, best ducat pick in yellow
Non-intrusive transparent overlay — auto-hides when reward screen closes
Works on Bazzite, Steam Deck (SteamOS), and any Wayland/XWayland desktop

description.p: Initial release — full relic reward detection pipeline.
